title: CDE Forever Love Heart Necklaces for Women, Wedding Anniversary, Birthday Mothers Day Gifts for Mom, Mother, Wife, Girlfriend, S925 Silver Jewelry with Birthstone Pendant
description:
925 STERLING SILVER WITH Rhodium/ROSE GOLD PLATED: The pendant and the chain are made of 925 sterling silver with high cost Rhodium or rose gold plating surface. These safe materials have low sensitivity and oxidation resistance.
UNIQUE HEART-SHAPE DESIGN: CDE 2020 double heart pendant necklaces symbolize love for each other, suitable as Mother’s Day gifts for mom, Valentine’s Day gifts, Christmas gifts, birthday gifts, wedding gifts, anniversary gifts for her/wife/girlfriend/women. The open heart necklace is engraved with “I love you for always and forever”, expressing love for mother, commitment to a loved one or friendship for a confidante.
GEM-QUALITY AAAAA CUBIC ZIRCONIA: In the central of the pendent, it is inlaid with a gem-quality 5A cubic zirconia. 5A cubic zirconia is the highest grade in zirconia, which is elaborately selected from the 5A zirconia, with the most accurate size and perfect cutting, reflecting the dazzling light.
THE 12-MONTH BIRTHDAY STONES: There are 12 different colors of gemstones, corresponding to the birthstone of each month. You can choose the color according to the birth month. Ruby in July means passion, kindness and dignity. Olivine in August means happiness. Sapphire in September means love, honesty, virtue. Tourmaline in October means joy and peace. Topaz in November means friendship and hope. Tanzanite in December means victory, good luck and success.
SIZE & SERVICE : Pendant Size: 0.83”ⅹ1.02”. Zirconia Size: 0.3”ⅹ0.3”. Chain Length: 15.7”+2.7”. The pendent necklace comes with a elegant gift box. No wrapping needed. If there is any problem with our product, don’t hesitate to contact us as soon as possible. We will do our best to satisfy you！

reviews.comment: I purchased the necklace as a 45th anniversary gift for my wife and she loves it!  She especially loves the design and the delicate gold chain that comes with it.
Great gift for my wife she really loves it
Necklace was amazing. It shined beautifully under regular light and low light conditions. It was the perfect length, so it fit my girlfriend perfectly as well, she loved it.
Very very pretty😍 so very pleased
